title: Great Temptation
description: This mod is about infection. After all, half of all creatures will be infected. The player's goal is to get rid of the problem.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4fcb2554c32fd6d30ac13900f9d72962a079994.png)
# Great Temptation is a mod designed for servers and clients and to have fun in battles with infected entities, robots. There are also several events and game mechanics in the fashion.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

There are no events at the moment. They are still being developed.

</details>
